title: Potion of Gaseous Form

markdown:
# Potion of Gaseous Form

- **Type**: P|XPHB
- **Weight**: 0.5 lb.

When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the [[gaseous_form Form]] spell for 1 hour (no Concentration required) or until you end the effect as a [[bonus_action Action]].

This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.
